prompts.author: @ShamiWeb3
prompts.text: 15-second cinematic video, ultra-smooth camera, natural focus pulls, warm-to-cool color shift, photorealistic 8K, ARRI Alexa look. Macro close-up of a Michelin-style salmon rose—glossy, orange-pink layers. Knife makes a slow precise slice, oils shimmer (0–3s). Focus pulls to a calm young man in side profile as he lifts a bite (3–5s). Extreme close-up bite—slow chew, eyes soften, subtle smile (5–7s). Fast push into his eye—reflection blooms into light, scene dissolves (7–8s). Underwater world: wide shot, sun rays through turquoise water, corals, seaweed, schools of salmon swimming. Man floats weightlessly, watching fish in calm wonder. Slow orbit, light beams shifting (8–13s). Match cut back to restaurant—same angle, he swallows, smiles, continues eating (13–15s). SFX: knife slice, soft chew, restaurant ambiance fading into underwater sounds and back. No text overlays.

prompts.author: @aimikoda
prompts.text: FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / 8 shots / compact action duel loop SUBJECTS: One occult fighter and one curse-like creature, both drawn as 2.5D line-art characters with visible contour lines, interior sketch lines and light hatching, never solid black fill, one body each in every beat. SCENE: Black and white 3D sketch-anime combat inside a minimal sketch ruin on white paper. Keep clear 2.5D line-art characters with contour lines, interior construction strokes and light hatching, not black silhouette bodies. Start on direct impact, not entry, with both characters already in mid-exchange at center frame. Use aggressive cinematic framing, hard impact punctuation, sharp micro-pauses, strong anticipation and forceful follow-through while preserving left-right continuity and readable strike lanes. The creature uses short curse bursts, limb warping and ink shockwaves. Build the action as a seamless loop so the final rush reconnects directly into the opening clash. The space has floor, broken wall planes and depth, and only redraws on hits, surges or skids. MOOD: Occult pressure, supernatural force, hard cinematic impact, seamless loop energy. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading STYLE: 3D hand-drawn sketch anime with 2.5D line-art characters, bold cinematic action framing and readable curse-battle choreography TIMELINE: 1. Smash cut, low 24mm impact track, open on direct mid-clash at center frame as fighter's short strike and creature's forearm collide, lines splinter outward, both bodies compress then snap past each other without stopping, SFX: impact snap, brush tear. 2. Hard cut, 35mm handheld push, fighter pivots out of the pass, shoulder-feints and lands a short body strike under guard, both recoil half a step with visible force transfer, SFX: air slice, ink thud. 3. Whip pan, 50mm side track, creature whips a warped forearm across a clear lane and sheds a short ink shockwave, fighter slips under both by inches, SFX: heavy whoosh, brush tear, ink flare. 4. Smash cut, 28mm close pursuit, micro-pause, fighter plants, twists through the hips and drives a compact rib counter, impact distortion spikes and the camera kicks with contact, SFX: crack hit, ink burst. 5. Match cut, 40mm rear three-quarter, creature skids backward as floor and wall lines redraw under the impact path, SFX: scrape, paper rip, low ink pulse. 6. Hard cut, 32mm handheld orbit, creature slams back in with one arm warping longer, fighter gives ground, parries high and pivots across the axis to keep continuity, SFX: double hit, sharp breath, tendon stretch. 7. Whip pan, 65mm impact close-up, fighter coils low, holds one sharp micro-pause, then releases a decisive upward strike, recoil whips through both bodies and the frame blows out white for a beat, SFX: deep crack, white flash burst. 8. Hard cut, 24mm wide pursuit frame, creature regathers, fires a short chest-level curse burst and surges back to center as fighter rebounds into the same opposing rush geometry as beat 1, SFX: trailing crack, paper hiss, ink burst, rushing foot drag.

prompts.author: @Kiber_Alla
prompts.text: Overarching Concept: Continuous character journey, moving from gritty Y2K streetwear on a dark rooftop to a stylized, high-tech "tech-ninja" aesthetic inside a pristine white iOS interface dimension. Fast-paced, fluid, and highly interactive with the camera. Universal Rule: The same red-haired woman from Scene 1 must appear in all subsequent scenes, ensuring perfect visual continuity. Scene 1 (00:00–00:01): Rooftop Throw Location: Windy urban rooftop at night, glowing city skyline. Wardrobe (Character 1): Y2K style — baggy vintage denim jacket, graphic baby tee, wide-leg parachute pants. Character Continuity: A specific red-haired woman with wavy copper hair. Action & Camera: Static camera. The red-haired woman spins rapidly, her loose clothes catching the wind. Mid-spin, she throws an iPhone 17 Pro Max directly into the camera lens. Scene 2 (00:01–00:02): Giant Phone Spin Location: Blurred night city backdrop. Action & Camera: Focus pulls to the giant, spinning iPhone 17 Pro Max in the foreground. It stops spinning, hovering vertically and centered. Scene 3 (00:02–00:07): The "Twist & Pull" Transition (CRITICAL FOCUS — NO GLASS BREAKING) Location: Still on the night rooftop, phone centered. Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman (from Scene 1) is visible inside the glowing white phone screen, smiling confidently. Wardrobe (Character 2): A tight, form-fitting, cropped matte-black leather motorcycle jacket over a white top. Action (The Twist): Her hand smoothly emerges from the screen into 3D space (the screen acts like a fluid boundary — no glass breaking). She reaches toward the camera and performs a twisting motion with her wrist and fingers — exactly like screwing in a lightbulb or turning a dial. Camera (Max Zoom): As she twists, the camera zooms in maximally on her hand. Action (The Pull): She reverses the twisting motion and rapidly retracts her hand back into the phone. Camera (The Dive): This reverse motion acts as a physical "pull." As she yanks her hand back, she pulls the camera with her — the camera flies rapidly into the phone screen, fully entering the digital interface. Scene 4 (00:07–00:14): UI Dimension & The Final Punchline Location: Bright, infinite white 3D space. Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman stands center, smiling confidently. Wardrobe (Character 3 — "Tech-Ninja"): Full matte-black tactical jumpsuit in technical fabric; asymmetrical layered vest with utility straps; multi-strap chest harness with glowing magnetic buckles; full gloves with integrated digital displays; chunky combat platform boots. Interface Elements: Gigantic simplified floating 3D app icons — Instagram camera, TikTok "d", Snapchat ghost — swirling around her. The Finale: She looks directly at the camera, playfully catches a glowing "Like" (Heart) icon from the air, gives a sharp wink, and throws the icon straight into the camera lens. The icon covers the lens, turning the screen instantly to black — creating a definitive ending or a seamless loop back to the start. #Seedance2

prompts.author: @ertanlabs
prompts.text: Stickman Fight with Seedance 2.0 Prompt FORMAT: 15s / 182 BPM / 7 CUTS / minimalist 2D stick-fight animation, pure white background, ultra-fast readability SUBJECTS: Two 2D stick fighters drawn in solid black lines on a blank white field. One is lean, evasive, and elastic. The other is wider, heavier, and constantly presses forward with crushing force. ENVIRONMENT: Empty white void, no props. Only black speed lines, impact rings, smear frames, skid marks, and sharp red blood accents. Clean negative space keeps every move instantly readable. MOOD: Brutal, explosive, relentless, stylish, unfinished. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading TIMELINE: 0:00-0:01 - Wide shot, extreme negative space. The lean fighter stands centered and still. The heavy fighter drops from above already throwing a downward strike. Sudden hard push-in. 24mm wide feel. SFX: air drop, hard land, cutting whoosh. 0:01-0:03 - CUT ON ACTION. Side wide shot. Heavy fighter unleashes jab, hook, knee. Lean fighter slips, guards, absorbs the knee, then fires back with calf kick, straight punch, spinning back kick. prompts.text: **Environment:** A frozen glacial valley under pale arctic twilight. Deep cobalt shadows across the ice field with cold blue ambient light reflecting from massive glacier walls. Snow particles drifting through the air. Frozen lake surfaces acting as natural mirrors for diegetic reflections. **Action:** 15.0s sequence. A towering figure composed of crystalline ice and refracting light engages a magma-armored titan whose body glows through volcanic fissures beneath black stone plating. They clash in rapid close-range combat across the frozen lake. Each strike fractures the ice beneath them, sending radial cracks spreading outward. The magma titan’s punches melt sections of the glacier while the ice giant counters with explosive frost bursts that instantly freeze the molten rock. Velocity Ramp choreography: rapid exchanges freeze into ultra-slow motion when fists collide, showing ice crystals shattering and lava droplets vaporizing before snapping back to full speed as both titans slide across the ice surface. **Camera:** Low tracking shot sliding across the frozen lake surface, reflections capturing both combatants. A sudden upward crane move follows the moment the magma titan is thrown into a glacier wall, ice exploding outward. **Style & Constraints:** 8K resolution, photorealistic volumetric snow, ray-traced reflections on ice surfaces, cinematic cold lighting, 35mm film grain, stable geometry, no flicker. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 can replicate all currently popular short videos Seedance 2.0 prompt [Style] Y2K Retro Pool Party, MiniDV Camcorder Texture (Camcorder Footage), Overexposed Warm Yellow, Film Grain, VHS Interference Lines, Fast-Paced Beat-Synced [Duration] 15 seconds [Scene] 2000s American Backyard Pool Party, Blazing Sun, Dazzling Water Ripples, Folding Lounge Chairs, Silver CD Player, Rainbow Inflatable Floats, Plastic Whale [Characters] A group of Y2K-styled girls: Low-Rise Bikinis, Belly Chains, Colorful Plastic Sunglasses, Butterfly Clips, Glitter Lip Gloss [00:00-00:01.5] Shot 1: Bursting Out of Water (Close-up / Pullback) DV Boot-Up Blue Screen Flashes with REC Red Dot. In-Your-Face Close-Up—A girl wearing colorful plastic sunglasses erupts from underwater, flinging wet hair to spray an arc of water (Slow-mo), water droplets splashing the lens, grinning wide at the DV as sunlight overexposes to pure white. [00:01.5-00:03] Shot 2: Poolside Stroll (Low Angle / Right Pan) Low-angle waist-high right pan, three girls in sheer cover-ups clutching canned drinks saunter across wet tiles, one snapping a selfie with a flip phone, chunky platform flip-flops slapping the ground. [00:03-00:04.5] Shot 3: Shoving into the Pool (Dutch Angle) Dutch angle medium shot, one girl shoves her bestie into the pool from behind, soda can flying out, body splashing in with a massive spray, the pusher doubled over laughing. [00:04.5-00:06] Shot 4: FPV Dive (FPV Drone Dive) FPV dives from above skimming the water surface, girls lounging on floats soaking up the sun, one raising a disposable film camera (Disposable Camera) to flash the lens. [00:06-00:07] Shot 5: Ice in Glass (Macro / Still) Macro still frame, ice cubes drop into a plastic cup, orange liquid splashing up, the hand gripping it adorned with colorful rubber bracelets, sunlight piercing the liquid to cast caustic light spots. [00:07-00:08.5] Shot 6: Dance Tracking (Tracking / Backward Follow) Backward tracking locked on her face, a girl with wet hair clinging to her cheeks and butterfly clips in her hair sways in a woven bikini amid the crowd, hoop earrings swinging, smiling straight into the lens. [00:08.5-00:10] Shot 7: Diving Silhouette (Worm's Eye / Push-in) Worm's-eye upward push, girl launches off the diving board into a silhouette, sun exploding into lens flare, water droplets turning to sparkles in the air. [00:10-00:11.5] Shot 8: Clinking Glasses (Close-up / Left Pan) Quick left pan, two girls clink red plastic cups, liquid spilling out in golden arcs, eyes squinting with laughter. [00:11.5-00:13] Shot 9: DJ Over-the-Shoulder (OTS / Pull-in) Over-the-shoulder push-in on the DJ, foreground fingers hit buttons on the silver CD player, background girls go wild splashing water to the beat, backlit sprays forming a golden rain curtain. [00:13-00:15] Shot 10: Golden Hour Wide Freeze (Extreme Wide / Crane Rise) Crane shot rapidly pulls up, the entire pool party unfurling in golden hour warm light, packed with people and inflatable toys, water surface shattered into gold. Overlay DV timestamp "08/15/2000 PM 5:47," freeze-frame flickering to mimic VHS pause.

prompts.text: Get the prompt for Seedance 2.0 SHOT: camera_motion: tracking shot movement_dynamics: The camera stays anchored on the central silhouetted swordsman, executing fast micro-pans and sudden whip-pans to frame each incoming enemy from the darkness. The camera shakes violently on each high-impact flash to emphasize the kinetic energy and aggressive strobing rhythm of the scene. ACTIONS: core_action: A heavily silhouetted man in a deep red cinematic void stands in a martial arts combat stance holding a katana. A sequence of massive, monstrous silhouetted enemies rushes him sequentially from the shadows: a hulking bipedal reptile, a giant mutated arachnid, a shadowy wraith with elongated claws, a towering armored brute wielding a heavy mace, and a ferocious winged gargoyle. The swordsman executes blazing, precise katana strikes with authentic momentum conservation. Exactly upon blade contact with each target, a powerful 1-frame white light flash explodes, momentarily overexposing the entire scene and freezing the exact point of impact. Between the strobing flashes, the environment instantly plunges back into deep red darkness, while the defeated monsters immediately dissolve into black smoke or drop out of frame. prompts.author: @drjoetw
prompts.text: cat master deserves a nice break (made with Seedance 2.0 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority) PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts 1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes... then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back. 2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing. 3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted. 4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion. 5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect. 6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps. 7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles. 8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step. 9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS He walks back through temple gate. DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy

TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem
SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived
CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority)
PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke
ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room
COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber
CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts

1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE
Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes… then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back.

2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY
He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing.

3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION
Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted.

4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE
Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion.

5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION
Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect.

6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH
He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps.

7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST
Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles.

8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN
Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step.

9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS
He walks back through temple gate. Other monks salute. He tries to respond properly but only manages delayed, tired nods while still moving.

10 (14.5–15s) BED DROP END
Camera follows into dorm. He collapses instantly onto mat. Eyes close mid-fall. Final frame holds on stillness as wind chime rings once.

SFX: playful shakuhachi + brisk percussion engine, comedic taiko “bonk” hits on monk impacts, rope snap + water splash burst at well, fast wooden clack for training chaos, bamboo crack percussion in forest, ending with soft koto + single wind chime decay into silence.

prompts.text: Sun Wukong is my favorite legendary figure. (made with Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so ) Prompt share Cinematic hyper-dynamic fast-paced multi-shot sequence, epic mythological battlefield, IMAX film simulation, 35mm Panavision lens, f/4, heavy cinematic color grading, dramatic contrast between dark necrotic tones and radiant golden divine light. Shot 1: Extreme close-up on Sun Wukong’s face, covered in dirt and blood, golden eyes flickering with exhaustion yet defiance. His fur is matted, his breathing heavy. He kneels in the center of a ruined battlefield, his golden staff cracked and planted into the ground for support. Around him, countless skeletal warriors slowly close in, their hollow eyes glowing with eerie green fire. Shot 2: Rapid shaky handheld shot circling Wukong. The skeletal army tightens its formation, bones clattering, rusted weapons scraping. Wukong struggles to stand, gripping his staff, as the undead swarm prepares to strike from all directions. Shot 3: Low-angle shot from behind Wukong. Just as the skeletons lunge forward, a faint golden glow begins to emerge behind him, cutting through the darkness like dawn breaking through a storm. Shot 4: Sudden explosive bloom of radiant golden light. A towering Buddha manifestation appears behind Wukong, विशाल and serene, radiating infinite divine energy. The battlefield is instantly bathed in warm, overwhelming golden luminosity. Shot 5: Fast upward tilt. Rows upon rows of celestial soldiers materialize in the sky and on the ground behind the Buddha—heavenly generals clad in ornate golden armor, divine banners flowing, weapons shining with sacred light. Shot 6: Whip-pan across the battlefield. The skeletons freeze mid-attack, their bodies trembling under the pressure of the divine aura. Golden light surges outward like a tidal wave. Shot 7: Ultra-fast sequence of disintegration shots. The skeletal army is instantly reduced to ash—bones crack, dissolve, and scatter into glowing dust, evaporating into nothingness under the overwhelming holy radiance. Shot 8: Wide epic drone pull-back. Wukong stands silhouetted in front of the colossal golden Buddha and the vast heavenly army. The battlefield, once dark and corrupted, is now purified, glowing with divine light. Golden particles drift through the air like sacred snow. Final frame: Freeze in epic tension—Wukong gripping his staff, head slightly bowed, while behind him the Buddha and celestial army radiate infinite power, dominating the horizon. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #RPG

Shot 8: Wide epic drone pull-back. Wukong stands silhouetted in front of the colossal golden Buddha and the vast heavenly army. The battlefield, once dark and corrupted, is now purified, glowing with divine light. Golden particles drift through the air like sacred snow.

Final frame: Freeze in epic tension—Wukong gripping his staff, head slightly bowed, while behind him the Buddha and celestial army radiate infinite power, dominating the horizon.

prompts.author: @AIwithSynthia
prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 on @nsketchai Prompt A surreal battlefield in the sky: floating rock islands drifting through a thunderstorm, clouds swirling below like an ocean. The masked ronin dashes across the drifting platforms, pursued by a colossal winged beast whose chest is a swirling vortex of storm clouds and lightning. The camera hurtles from island to island, struggling to keep up as rocks tilt, spin, and crumble away beneath them. Every wingbeat sends shockwaves through the air, shaking the frame and blowing debris and rain straight into the viewer's face. Rapid handheld cuts capture the ronin leaping impossible gaps, sword carving arcs of light that briefly cut through the darkness. The finale shows the camera diving behind him as he jumps off the last crumbling rock, riding a bolt of lightning directly into the monster's chest vortex with a final, all-or-nothing slash that explodes the storm from within and clears the sky in a blinding flash.

Rolling plains stretch toward distant mountains while lightning flashes illuminate the rain-soaked terrain. **Action:** 15.0s sequence from the POV of a lightning wolf racing through tall grass. prompts.author: @drjoetw
prompts.text: Childhood nightmare unlocked...cat master fixed it (made with Seedance 2 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share / #NemoOneShotChallenge / Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic dark fairy-tale thriller with comedic twist, eerie enchanted forest, low-key lighting, cold moonlight filtering through dense trees, volumetric fog, high contrast shadows, dynamic handheld camera, expressive character animation, fast-paced storytelling. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: An orange cat older brother in blue overalls and a gray flat cap runs barefoot through a dark forest, pulling along a white cat little sister in a dirty pink dress, both breathing heavily. S2 (0.8s) Rear tracking shot: The forest behind them echoes with distant howling wolves, shadows shifting between trees. S3 (0.9s) Forward reveal: Through the fog, a glowing candy house made of sweets appears at the end of the path, colorful and surreal against the dark woods. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The siblings slow down, eyes wide—fear mixed with curiosity. S5 (0.8s) Door action: The orange cat cautiously pushes open the candy door, it creaks softly. S6 (0.9s) Interior wide: Inside, dim warm light reveals a strange room—giant half-open birdcage, scattered sweets, and a bed in the corner. S7 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed lies a white-haired “grandma” in green pajamas and a white shower cap, blanket half covering her face. S8 (0.9s) Dialogue moment: The “grandma” weakly gestures toward the birdcage, implying there is cake nearby, voice soft and inviting. S9 (0.8s) Insert shot: A cake sits temptingly near the open birdcage door. S10 (1.0s) Action split: The little sister eagerly reaches for the cake, while the orange cat narrows his eyes, scanning the room. S11 (0.9s) Suspicion reveal: Close-up at the foot of the bed—a wolf tail sticks out from beneath the blanket. S12 (1.0s) Action burst: The orange cat instantly grabs a nearby large iron shovel, swings it with full force toward the “grandma’s” head. S13 (1.0s) Impact & reveal: The shower cap flies off—“grandma” leaps up in pain, revealing a ferocious wolf face, snarling before panicking. S14 (1.0s) Escape: The wolf stumbles and scrambles out the door, fleeing into the dark forest. S15 (1.2s) Final comedic beat: The orange cat scratches the back of his head proudly, while the little sister happily eats cake beside him, cheering with crumbs on her face. Motion & Effects: Dynamic chase camera, shaky handheld for tension, fast snap zooms during action, exaggerated character expressions, cloth and fur simulation, soft glow from candy elements, contrast between horror atmosphere and playful comedic timing. #sd2 #seedance #CatsLover #aivideo ( NemoVideo × Seedance 2.0 The One-Shot Challenge) Contest Info: https:// nemovideo.com/workspace/seed ance-challenge ...

prompts.text: High-quality anime style, 2D animation. Warm, cinematic lighting with sunlight filtering through blinds. A tiny man wearing a green hoodie and blue jeans runs across a wooden floor toward a giantess. He climbs up her massive foot and leg, which are covered in black fishnet stockings, using the fishnet holes to climb. Dynamic low-angle camera following his ascent, emphasizing the colossal scale of the giantess. He climbs past her black pleated skirt and white collared shirt, scaling up her dark blue ribbed sweater. The camera pans up to reveal the giantess looking down at him. She has long brown hair, a flower hair clip, and large brown eyes. She wears a highly surprised, wide-eyed expression with a slight blush. Background is a softly blurred bedroom with a music keyboard.

prompts.author: @ertanlabs
prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt 15s / 180 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 360 POV downhill longboard run, viral energy, max chaos. SUBJECTS: First-person downhill longboard rider, front foot, deck nose, and flickering trucks appearing low in frame during drops, slides, and stair gaps. Flower pots, café chairs, scooters, cats, delivery bikes, tourists, and laundry erupt around the rider as sudden obstacles. ENVIRONMENT: Dense Mediterranean cliffside town, whitewashed stair alleys, blue shutters, tiled landings, sea-glow at the horizon, hanging laundry, tangled wires, sun-faded murals, narrow terraces, umbrellas, puddles, warm late afternoon light, deep stone shadows, layered rooftops dropping toward the coast below. MOOD: Adrenaline, max chaos, nonstop downhill street speed. COLOR LOGIC: Hyperreal Pop Look with sun-bleached whites, cobalt accents, coral signage, golden flare. CAMERA DETAILS: 360 action-cam POV, horizon-stable but brutal, nonstop forward drive, minimal roll, heavy stair vibration, sharp side and rear parallax, full-sphere chaos, no release. 0:00–0:03: POV freefalls into a steep stone stairwell, board nose rattling low in frame as the rider lands into brutal vibrating descent. A café server yanks a tray away from the line while walls, balconies, plants, and faces whip past inches away. SFX: sea wind, wheel chatter, stair hits, breath, distant crowd. 0:03–0:05: POV slashes left across a tiny tiled landing, clips past stacked flower pots, then snaps into another stair drop as hanging laundry lashes across the front hemisphere and tourists recoil. SFX: cloth slap, ceramic clink, wheel scrape, crowd gasp. 0:05–0:08: POV hammers the next staircase as a cat darts center frame and pigeons burst upward from a side ledge. The rider speed-check slides, then threads between a parked scooter and iron handrail with almost no clearance. SFX: tire chirp, wings flapping, metal rattle, stair thuds. 0:08–0:10: POV blasts over a short cobblestone gap between stair sections, trucks clacking, then drops straight into the next descending run as delivery bikes streak through the side wrap. SFX: wheel buzz, curb thump, distant horn, crowd echo. 0:10–0:13: POV attacks two tight landings and another steep stepped lane, every hit jolting the sphere as rooftops, awnings, church bells, alley mouths, and flashes of sea curl around the viewer. SFX: air rush, heavy thump, stair chatter, wind buffeting. 0:13–0:15: POV rips to a cliff overlook and throws into a savage stand-up slide, dust and tiny pebbles spraying across the lower frame while the glowing sea-town skyline blooms around the full sphere. SFX: wheel screech, gravel spray, crowd roar. Hyperreal, continuous-shot chaos, no text, no logos.

CAMERA DETAILS: 360 action-cam POV, horizon-stable but brutal, nonstop forward drive, minimal roll, heavy stair vibration, sharp side and rear parallax, full-sphere chaos, no release. 0:00–0:03: POV freefalls into a steep stone stairwell, board nose rattling low in frame as the rider lands into brutal vibrating descent. A café server yanks a tray away from the line while walls, balconies, plants, and faces whip past inches away. SFX: sea wind, wheel chatter, stair hits, breath, distant crowd. 0:03–0:05: POV slashes left across a tiny tiled landing, clips past stacked flower pots, then snaps into another stair drop as hanging laundry lashes across the front hemisphere and tourists recoil. SFX: cloth slap, ceramic clink, wheel scrape, crowd gasp. 0:05–0:08: POV hammers the next staircase as a cat darts center frame and pigeons burst upward from a side ledge. The rider speed-check slides, then threads between a parked scooter and iron handrail with almost no clearance. SFX: tire chirp, wings flapping, metal rattle, stair thuds. 0:08–0:10: POV blasts over a short cobblestone gap between stair sections, trucks clacking, then drops straight into the next descending run as delivery bikes streak through the side wrap. SFX: wheel buzz, curb thump, distant horn, crowd echo. 0:10–0:13: POV attacks two tight landings and another steep stepped lane, every hit jolting the sphere as rooftops, awnings, church bells, alley mouths, and flashes of sea curl around the viewer. SFX: air rush, heavy thump, stair chatter, wind buffeting. 0:13–0:15: POV rips to a cliff overlook and throws into a savage stand-up slide, dust and tiny pebbles spraying across the lower frame while the glowing sea-town skyline blooms around the full sphere. SFX: wheel screech, gravel spray, crowd roar. Hyperreal, continuous-shot chaos, no text, no logos.

prompts.text: Medieval cat master: cute first, survival later (created with Seedance 2.0 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic fantasy dark-comedy action, medieval European castle bedroom, warm candlelight vs cold moonlight contrast, dramatic shadows, ultra-dynamic camera, exaggerated character animation, high-detail textures, fast-paced editing, humorous tone. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: A chubby orange cat in full medieval European knight armor stands beside a luxurious canopy bed inside a castle bedroom, moonlight spilling through wooden windows. S2 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed, a white cat princess sleeps messily, loudly snoring, one paw casually picking her nose in an unrefined, comedic manner. S3 (0.9s) Medium shot: The orange cat shakes her urgently, armor clanking, trying to wake her up, visibly frustrated. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The princess continues snoring, completely unfazed, bubble forming from her nose. S5 (0.8s) Cut to window: Outside the wooden window, a pair of giant glowing eyes suddenly appears in the darkness. S6 (0.9s) Reveal shot: A pink fire-breathing dragon presses its face near the window, exhaling faint smoke, eyes wide and menacing. S7 (0.8s) Reaction shot: The orange cat freezes, then instantly turns serious, gripping his longsword. S8 (1.0s) Action burst: With a powerful kick, the orange cat smashes through the wooden window, splinters flying outward. S9 (1.0s) Balcony wide shot: The cat lands on the stone balcony, facing the hovering pink dragon under moonlight. S10 (1.0s) Combat: The cat lunges forward, slashing rapidly with the longsword, sparks and motion blur streaks. S11 (0.8s) Twist: The dragon suddenly opens its mouth and bites down, swallowing the sword whole. S12 (0.9s) Close-up: The orange cat pauses, then instantly switches expression, huge sparkling eyes, puffed cheeks, exaggerated ultra-cute innocent face. S13 (1.0s) Reaction: The dragon’s fierce expression melts into confusion and softness, flames dying down. S14 (1.0s) Punchline action: In a split-second, the orange cat snaps back to normal and kicks the dragon hard, sending it tumbling off the balcony into a deep abyss. S15 (1.2s) Final close-up: The orange cat turns to camera, smirks proudly, and gives a playful left-eye wink, armor gleaming in moonlight. Motion & Effects: Fast-paced comedic timing, strong motion blur, dynamic camera swings (orbit, low-angle, snap zooms), particle effects (wood splinters, smoke, sparks), expressive character animation, seamless flow, high-impact yet humorous finish. #sd2 #seedance #CatsLover #aivideo

prompts.author: @Mayz1169
prompts.text: Static close-up shot. A realistic human hand interacts with a flat 2D animated character of Furina — a blue and white dress anime girl with long light blue hair — inside a clear glass cup placed on a wooden table. [0-2s] The hand pinches Furina by the head and lowers her into the glass; she grabs the rim with both arms and resists, refusing to go in, while the fingers keep pressing her down. [2-4s] She loses grip and slides down the glass wall, desperately kicking and clawing at the wall trying to climb back up, but keeps slipping back to the bottom, with a surprised yelp. [4-7s] She gives up and slumps at the bottom, eyes shut, two exaggerated wide noodle-tears streaming down her cheeks, crying dramatically. [7-9s] She suddenly leaps up, shaking both fists at her sides furiously, tears still on her face, yelling angrily upward in protest — expression both crying and fuming, super cute. [9-11s] The finger reaches in and gently pats her head; she immediately stops, sits still obediently, hands clasped on her chest, looking up at the finger with big teary puppy eyes. [11-13s] The fingers pinch her head again and lift her straight up out of the glass; halfway up she tilts her head slightly, eyes half-lidded, a small smug tsundere smile on her lips. [13-15s] Fully lifted out and suspended in the air, her eyes open wide and she breaks into a big bright energetic grin, hands spread open happily, frame holds steady. AR mixed-media style: flat 2D cartoon character with full physical interaction with a real 3D glass — sliding and climbing along the glass wall, realistic glass refractions, cast shadows, and wall contact all rendered naturally. Soft warm natural lighting, super cute and heartwarming mood. #furina #genshinimpact

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 is insane. Prompt bellow inspired by @techhalla Raw mobile phone footage, vertical handheld shot, shaky cam, grainy texture. At the legendary Rucker Park basketball court at dusk, a heavy-set elderly black woman in a floral dress and sneakers is dribbling a basketball against a young, athletic streetballer in a jersey. The woman performs a lightning-fast crossover dribble, blowing past the stunned defender. She suddenly drives to the hoop and performs a powerful, explosive two-handed slam dunk, hanging on the rim briefly. The surrounding crowd of black teenagers and streetball fans goes wild, storming the court in a chaotic celebration. Lens flares, motion blur, authentic street lighting, high energy, viral social media video aesthetic.

prompts.author: @ShadeLurk
prompts.text: A small white mushroom-eared creature is hurled forward from outstretched hands. It tumbles toward the camera, its white body swelling until it fills the entire frame — white flash. Chase camera locks behind the mushroom-eared creature as it rockets forward and slams into a wall of red crystalline armor. On impact it explodes — cyan crystal shards and square pixel-particles burst radially. The creature splits into several identical copies that scatter in every direction. The camera pulls straight up, revealing a circular red arena from overhead. The copies ricochet off surfaces in erratic bouncing arcs, each landing triggering a magenta or blue starburst flash. A white variant joins mid-sequence, trailing blue beam lines. The bouncing grows chaotic with overlapping hit effects. One mushroom-eared creature arcs directly past the lens, its body blocking the frame — wipe to black. A character stands behind a large golden wheel covered in ornate engravings. Both hands grip the wheel's rim and push — the wheel spins. The character grins while watching it turn. The camera starts tight on the character's hands and the spinning wheel, then slowly widens. Red carnival lamps ring the stage. Gold sparkles drift upward. Small white and black mushroom-eared creatures sit in the foreground as an audience, arms raised. The spinning golden wheel glows brighter frame by frame, bleaching to searing white. All figures become silhouettes against the expanding light. The camera pushes IN toward the light source — total whiteout. White flash erupts. A warm-colored blast wave expands outward from center screen. Smaller mushroom-eared creatures launch outward from the center in every direction. The character strikes a double peace sign as multicolored confetti rains from above.

prompts.author: @johnAGI168
prompts.text: Mockumentary (Vlog Style) As long as it can be imagined and described accurately and clearly, I feel like Seedance 2.0 can generate it all Seedance 2.0 prompt Style: Mockumentary (Vlog Style), hyper-realism, fixed camera real-shot feel, natural light, suspense comedy vibe, mobile phone vertical screen shooting texture Duration: 15 seconds Scene: Ordinary family living room, in front of white walls, afternoon sidelight streaming in from the window, yoga mat on the floor, clear human shadows projected on the wall Characters: Female lead @image1 , wearing a sports tank top and yoga pants, ponytail, recording a dance video against a phone tripod [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Everyday Setup (Normalcy / Fixed Camera) Frame: Fixed camera medium shot, phone selfie perspective. Action: Female lead makes a heart gesture to the camera, then starts dancing a simple popular TikTok routine, movements a bit clumsy, occasionally glancing at the phone on the floor for cues. Key Details: At this point, the shadow on the wall is completely normal, perfectly in sync with her movements. Background is quiet, only the music from the Bluetooth speaker playing. Atmosphere: Utterly everyday, no hints of anything unusual. [00:05-00:11] Shot 2: BUG Emerges (The Glitch / Same Fixed Camera) Action: Female lead repeats the same dance segment, and midway through a turn— High-Energy Moment (Core Punch): The shadow on the wall suddenly **doesn't follow the turn**, instead switching on its own to a completely different set of high-difficulty street dance moves (Breaking Power Move), the shadow executing a flawless Thomas full spin on the wall, smooth and fluid. Female lead hasn't noticed yet, keeps dancing her simple steps, but the shadow has fully broken sync, going wild with a solo on the wall. Director's Note: The shadow's dance skills should clearly outclass the body. The bigger the contrast in their moves, the stronger the comedy—body doing the "I Love You" hand gesture dance, shadow pulling off windmill floor moves. [00:11-00:15] Shot 3: Comedy Reversal (The Punchline / Same Fixed Camera) Action: Female lead finishes dancing and looks back at the phone replay, spots the shadow's anomaly, whips her head around to glare at the wall. Result: The shadow has now reverted to normal—obediently mirroring every one of her movements. Female lead suspiciously raises her right hand slowly, shadow raises its right hand too. She quickly switches to left hand—shadow follows without a hitch. Final Freeze: Female lead with a "Am I losing my mind?" expression straight to the camera, but in the last 0.5 seconds before the frame ends, the shadow sneaks in a peace sign gesture the instant she looks at the lens. Frame freezes on this beat.

[00:11-00:15] Shot 3: Comedy Reversal (The Punchline / Same Fixed Camera)  
Action: Female lead finishes dancing and looks back at the phone replay, spots the shadow's anomaly, whips her head around to glare at the wall.  
Result: The shadow has now reverted to normal—obediently mirroring every one of her movements. Female lead suspiciously raises her right hand slowly, shadow raises its right hand too. She quickly switches to left hand—shadow follows without a hitch.  
Final Freeze: Female lead with a "Am I losing my mind?" expression straight to the camera, but in the last 0.5 seconds before the frame ends, the shadow sneaks in a peace sign gesture the instant she looks at the lens. Frame freezes on this beat.

Hands pick up dough ball, begin stretching it sideways — dough pulls and stretches thin, flour dust lifts into sunlight in slow motion. Hands place stretched dough flat on floured surface, grab wooden rolling pin — roll firmly forward and back, dough spreads wide, edges curl slightly. Hands lift dough round, lay it flat. prompts.author: @1littlecoder
prompts.text: The camera rockets up from below, tearing past jagged cliff walls, then whips into a downward tilt to reveal the ocean below in full violent eruption, waves detonating against black rock. On the cliff edge stands a warrior woman, utterly fearless, gazing into the maelstrom as if daring it to rise higher. She steps forward without hesitation and leaps off the edge, arms spread wide, plummeting through howling wind and salt spray. The camera dives alongside her in freefall, her hair and cloak thrashing upward as the black rocks and churning sea rush closer. Then a massive shadow tears through the mist below — a dragon surges upward with wings unfurling like storm sails, scales gleaming wet with ocean spray. It swoops beneath her mid-fall, and she lands on its back with practiced grace, fingers gripping the ridges along its neck. The dragon banks hard, climbing in a spiraling arc back up past the cliff face. The camera keeps pace, circling tight, then pulls ahead into a final close, frontal reveal: she rides the beast skyward, wind-whipped, calm, and burning with determination, the raging ocean now small and powerless far below.

prompts.author: @ShamiWeb3
prompts.text: Create a 4-second ultra-cute vertical animated character video. A tiny fluffy purple puppy-like creature with soft fur, a round face, big glossy expressive eyes, a small black nose, short floppy ears, and adorable baby proportions. The style is polished soft 3D animation, very cute, smooth fur, pastel purple background, soft studio lighting. The character walks forward slowly with natural body bounce and soft paw movement, first looking slightly away with an innocent expression. Then it turns its head and upper body toward the camera, gives a surprised but cheeky look, and raises one hand to show one middle finger clearly. It then turns forward again for a brief beat as if continuing to walk, then quickly looks back at the camera with a more mischievous expression and raises both hands, showing two middle fingers clearly at the same time. End on the double gesture for a brief moment so it is readable. Focus on smooth body plasticity, head turn, shoulder turn, eye movement, hand gesture clarity, and cute facial expression. The eyes must be large, shiny, and very expressive. The fur must look soft and detailed. The motion must be funny, cute, and playful, not aggressive. No text on screen. No captions. No overlays. Visual style: ultra-cute polished 3D character animation, soft pastel lighting, clean background, meme-ready, adorable but sassy. No realism, no horror, no ugly face, no distorted eyes, no extra fingers, no extra limbs, no blurry motion, no low-detail fur, no dark background, no aggressive tone, no human body proportions.
